notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.message: Sorry, the page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

serverError.title: Something Went Wrong
serverError.message: We're having trouble loading this page. Please try again later.

maintenance.title: Under Maintenance
maintenance.message: We're performing scheduled maintenance. We'll be back shortly.

forbidden.title: Access Denied
forbidden.message: You don't have permission to access this page.

form.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address

form.invalidPostalCode: Please enter a valid postal code
form.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least {min} characters

form.invalidExpiry: Please enter a valid expiry date
form.maxLength: Must be no more than {max} characters
form.fileTooLarge: File size must be less than {size}

api.networkError: Network error. Please check your internet connection.
api.timeout: The request timed out. Please try again.
api.serverError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
api.unauthorized: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
api.forbidden: You don't have permission to perform this action.
api.notFound: The requested resource was not found.
api.conflict: This action conflicts with the current state. Please refresh and try again.
api.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
api.paymentFailed: Payment failed. Please check your payment details and try again.
api.outOfStock: One or more items in your cart are no longer available.
api.cartExpired: Your cart has expired. Please add items again.
